name: Integrity Staffing Solutions, Inc. v. Busk
question: Is time spent undergoing security clearances compensable under the Fair Labor Standards Act as amended by the Portal-to-Portal Act of 1947?
description: A case in which the Court ruled that employees of Integrity Staffing Solutions, Inc. could not be compensated for time spent passing through security checkpoints, because the checkpoints were not integral to their principal duties as employees.
